raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX I was going through and cancelling credit cards that I never use, I came to the home depot card, through citi-card and saw that someone had maxed it out with purchasses in XXXX, and the card had been canceled. I called Citi-card to report fraud, and open an investigation. I was told that in XXXX months I would recieve a letter. about 7 months later I called again to report it again, and was told the same thing. I have never recieved anything back from them. I have continuted to make the minimum payment in good faith.
